## What changed

Describe the user-visible or developer-visible outcome.

## Why

Name the problem and the contract or invariant involved.

## Proof

- [ ] Focused test or reproduction passes
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
- [ ] `npm run release:check` passes when packaging, schemas, CLI, or viewer assets changed
- [ ] No credentials, private decision data, raw provider transcripts, or machine-specific paths are included

## Compatibility

Describe schema, CLI, artifact, or behavior changes. Write `None` when not applicable.
